text.div:
• Include these codes as defined in https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/codesystem-emcare-custom-codes
    CodeDisplay
    EmCare.B14S2.DE19Skin Lesions ≥ 4 cm
    EmCare.B14S2.DE20Red Skin Streaks
    EmCare.B14S2.DE21Tender Nodes (Nodules) under the skin
    EmCare.B14S2.DE22Skin Infection extends to Muscle
    EmCare.B14S2.DE23Molluscum Contagiosum - Skin coloured pearly white papules with central umbilication. Most commonly seen on face and trunk in children.
    EmCare.B14S2.DE24Warts - Papules or nodules with a rough (Verrucous) surface
    EmCare.B14S2.DE25Seborrhea - Greasy scales and redness on central face and body folds
    EmCare.B14S2.DE26Fixed Drug Reactions - Generalised red, wide spread with small bumps or blisters; or one or more dark skin areas
    EmCare.B14S2.DE27Eczema - Wet oozing sores or excoriated, thick patches
    EmCare.B14S2.DE28Steven Johnson Syndrome - Severe reaction due to cotrimoxazole or NVP involving the skin as well as the eyes and the mouth. Might cause difficulty in breathing

name: valueset-severe-impetigo-
title: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
description: Codes representing possible values for the Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth element

designation.value: The client has Skin Lesions ≥ 4 cm
The client has red skin streaks
The client has tender nodes (nodules) under the skin that can appear on any part of the face or body
The client has skin infection that extends to muscle

concept.display: Molluscum Contagiosum - Skin coloured pearly white papules with central umbilication. Most commonly seen on face and trunk in children.
